name: The Gamer Club Open Day
location: The Gamer Club, 153 Bath Lane, Glasgow, G2 4RH
description:
24/7 members club, hack space and geek events hub in Glasgow.

Come join us for our free monthly open day from 1pm - 6pm.

Take a tour of the venue and check out our five rooms dedicated to gaming, including: The arcade, the gaming lounge, the kitchen with movies and couch games, the PC room with gaming PCs, mini hackerspace and darts board and the main room with gaming projector, board games, tabletop RPGS and comics.

Join us for a fun day of games and meet The Gamer Club community!
short_description: Free monthly open day at The Gamer Club in Glasgow — tour the venue, play games, and meet the community.
